zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Keith Great Marischal of Scotland於1308年出生在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾時，他的父親John de Graham of Dundaff63歲，母親Marjory Halliday38歲。他和Margaret Fraser至少有3個女兒。他去世於1407年5月2日在英國蘇格蘭金加迪爾登諾塔享年99歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭金加迪爾登諾塔。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Keith Great Marischal of Scotland于1308年出生在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾时，他的父亲John de Graham of Dundaff63岁，母亲Marjory Halliday38岁。他和Margaret Fraser至少有3个女儿。他去世于1407年5月2日在英国苏格兰金加迪爾登諾塔享年99岁，埋葬在苏格兰金加迪爾登諾塔。

nameMeanings.name: Keith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the lands of Keith in East Lothian. The placename is derived from British Celtic cait- ‘wood’. In the 17th century numerous bearers of this name settled in Ulster.
German: nickname from Middle High German kīt ‘sprout, offspring’.

History: George Keith (c. 1638–1716), born at Peterhead, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, came to NJ in or before 1685. In 1689 he settled in Philadelphia, where he became headmaster of the school now called the William Penn Charter School. He came into sharp collision with the Quaker leaders in PA and formed a separatist party known as the Christian Quakers, popularly known as ‘Keithians’.

variants.name: Kight
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Kite  .

variants.name: Keath
meanings: Scottish and English (mainly Cambridgeshire): variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Kite
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English kete, kyte ‘kite’ (the bird of prey), perhaps a nickname for a rapacious person.
English: habitational name from one or more of the minor places with names deriving from Old English cȳte, cyte ‘cottage, hut, shed’, such as Kite Farm in Swalecliffe (Kent).

variants.name: Keeth
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Keitt
meanings: Possibly an altered form of German   Keith   2.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Keith Great Marischal of Scotland was born in 1308, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, his father, John de Graham of Dundaff, was 63 and his mother, Marjory Halliday, was 38. He had at least 3 daughters with Margaret Fraser. He died on 2 May 1407, in Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 99, and was buried in Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Keith Great Marischal of Scotland est né en 1308, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse, son père, John de Graham of Dundaff, avait 63 ans et sa mère, Marjory Halliday, avait 38 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 filles avec Margaret Fraser. Il est décédé le 2 mai 1407, à Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 99 ans, et a été enterré à Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Keith Great Marischal of Scotland 1308 in Aberdeenshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Graham of Dundaff 63 und seine Mutter Marjory Halliday 38. Er hatte mit Margaret Fraser mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb am 2. Mai 1407 im Alter von 99 Jahren in Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Keith Great Marischal of Scotland è nato il nel 1308 nel Aberdeenshire, Scotland, il suo padre, John de Graham of Dundaff, aveva 63 anni e il suo madre, Marjory Halliday, aveva 38 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figlie con Margaret Fraser. Morì il 2 maggio 1407, nel Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 99 anni, e fu sepolto a Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Keith Great Marischal of Scotlandが1308年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアで生まれた時，父John de Graham of Dundaffは63歳，母Marjory Hallidayは38歳であった。彼はMargaret Fraserとの間に少なくとも3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1407年5月2日にイギリススコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアダノッタルで99歳で死去し，スコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアダノッタルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Keith Great Marischal of Scotland(이)가 1308년 스컷랜드 압르디실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Graham of Dundaff(은)는 63세였고, 그의 어머니 Marjory Halliday(은)는 38세였다. 그는 Margaret Fraser(와)과 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1407년 5월 2일 영국 스코틀랜드 킨카딘실르 던타르에서 99세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 킨카딘실르 던타르에 묻혔다.

mn.Aboyne, Aberdeen, Scotland: Aboyne, Coontie o Aiberdeen, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Keith Great Marischal of Scotland nasceu em 1308, em Aberdeenshire, Scotland, seu pai, John de Graham of Dundaff, tinha 63 anos e sua mãe, Marjory Halliday, tinha 38 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhas com Margaret Fraser. Ele faleceu em 2 de maio de 1407, em Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 99 anos, e foi sepultado em Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Keith Great Marischal of Scotland родился в 1308 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John de Graham of Dundaff было 63 года, а матери, которую звали Marjory Halliday, 38. У него было по крайней мере 3 дочери от Margaret Fraser. Он умер 2 мая 1407 г. в местности дунноттар, кинкардаинешир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 99 лет и был похоронен в местности дунноттар, кинкардаинешир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Keith Great Marischal of Scotland nació en 1308, en Aberdeenshire, Scotland, su papá, John de Graham of Dundaff, tenía 63 años y su mamá, Marjory Halliday, tenía 38 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijas con Margaret Fraser. Murió el 2 de mayo de 1407, en Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 99 años, y fue sepultado en Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scotland.
